exercises.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.arange(1000, dtype=float)
b = a.copy()
s_loop = 0.0
for i in range(len(a)):
    s_loop += a[i] * b[i]
s_vec = float((a * b).sum())
print(abs(s_loop - s_vec) < 1e-6)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer en S14-T4-A-E1 (guided): resolví el fixture del paquete para «S14-T4-A» respetando el pass «True». Usé theory/iDo (S14-T1-A-DEMO) y pistas ['np.arange(1000, dtype=float).', 'Compara resultados no tiempos.'] del slim packet, sin solutions externas. Cierre: print(abs(s_loop - s_vec) < 1e-6)

exercises.code:
import numpy as np, time
n = 10000
a = np.zeros(n)
b = np.ones(n)
t0 = time.perf_counter()
c = a + b
_ = time.perf_counter() - t0
print("timed", float(c.mean()) == 1.0)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Explorer en S14-T4-A-E3 (transfer): resolví el fixture del paquete para «S14-T4-A» respetando el pass «timed True». Usé theory/iDo (S14-T1-A-DEMO) y pistas ['time.perf_counter antes/después.', 'No necesitas ratio; solo demostrar timing + correctness.'] del slim packet, sin solutions externas. Cierre: print("timed", float(c.mean()) == 1.0)
